lineage.Process: FeatureClassToFeatureClass K:\CODServices\COD_SSD\Candidates\SSD_AdminBoundaries_candidate.gdb\ssd_admbndl_admALL_imwg_nbs_itos_20230829 K:\CODServices\COD_SSD\Candidates\ssd_admbnda_imwg_nbs_20230829_SHP ssd_admbndl_admALL_imwg_nbs_itos_20230829.shp # "Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,K:\CODServices\COD_SSD\Candidates\SSD_AdminBoundaries_candidate.gdb\ssd_admbndl_admALL_imwg_nbs_itos_20230829,Shape_Length,-1,-1;admLevel "admLevel" true true false 2 Short 0 0 ,First,#,K:\CODServices\COD_SSD\Candidates\SSD_AdminBoundaries_candidate.gdb\ssd_admbndl_admALL_imwg_nbs_itos_20230829,admLevel,-1,-1;date "date" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,K:\CODServices\COD_SSD\Candidates\SSD_AdminBoundaries_candidate.gdb\ssd_admbndl_admALL_imwg_nbs_itos_20230829,date,-1,-1;validOn "validOn" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,K:\CODServices\COD_SSD\Candidates\SSD_AdminBoundaries_candidate.gdb\ssd_admbndl_admALL_imwg_nbs_itos_20230829,validOn,-1,-1;validTo "validTo" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,K:\CODServices\COD_SSD\Candidates\SSD_AdminBoundaries_candidate.gdb\ssd_admbndl_admALL_imwg_nbs_itos_20230829,validTo,-1,-1" #

citRespParty.rpOrgName: South Sudan Information Management Working Group (IMWG)

dataIdInfo.idAbs: The dataset was created by ITOS by converting the South Sudan Admin3 polygon layer to lines

Consts.useLimit: See the COD/FOD Registry Terms of Use. This does not replace any terms of use information provided with the dataset.

dataIdInfo.idPurp: Administrative boundary lines for South Sudan admin level 0-3. Each line is attributed with the highest Admin level that it can represent. These lines can be helpful for cartographic purposes.

dataLineage.statement:
Layer was created by ITOS by converting the South Sudan Admin3 polygon layer to lines. The lines were created after all processing on the admin layer had been completed by ITOS.
An 'AdminLevel' field is used to attribute the lines. The values used for this field are: (0,1,2,3,4,5,99). 99 represents coastline. 0 is international border, 1 is Admin1 border, 2 is Admin2 border, etc. Each line is attributed with the highest admin level that it can participate in.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The creation date of the dataset. If unknown, the date the dataset was received.
The date the candidate or service was created.
This will be populated if you are archiving this data and replacing it with another set. It will be blank for initial deployments.
